title: Electrolytes and Nerve Signals
script_summary: Exploring how electrolytes influence nerve signals.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about electrolytes and nerve signals.
Electrolytes are minerals that carry electric charges, vital for nerve function.
Without the right balance, signals can misfire, leading to cramps or fatigue.
Studies show that sodium and potassium are key players in this process.
Research indicates that optimal electrolyte levels enhance cognitive function.
Stay hydrated and keep your electrolytes balanced for peak brain performance! Follow for more science insights.
